title: Termination
doc_html:
§1367.14. Termination

            The provisions of this Subpart shall be null and void and have no effect beginning on June 30, 2027.

            Acts 2025, No. 208, §1, eff. June 8, 2025.
doc_text:
§1367.14. Termination
The provisions of this Subpart shall be null and void and have no effect beginning
on June 30, 2027.
Acts 2025, No. 208, §1, eff. June 8, 2025.
